prose:
**Acrolein Fukui Reactivity Indices** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: provided as `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/acrolein.xyz`. SCF converged.

The Fukui reactivity indices and dual descriptor values for each atom are as follows (atom indices are 0-based):

| Atom (0-idx) | Symbol | f+ (electrophilicity) | f- (nucleophilicity) | f0 (radical) | Dual Descriptor (Δf) |
|--------------|--------|-----------------------|----------------------|--------------|----------------------|
| 0            | O      | 0.40136419            | 0.39388616           | 0.39762517   | 0.0074780351         |
| 1            | C      | 0.022255106           | 0.0059884353         | 0.01412177   | 0.01626667           |
| 2            | C      | 0.43404673            | 0.091403097          | 0.26272491   | 0.34264363           |
| 3            | C      | 0.64232102            | 0.087369815          | 0.36484542   | 0.5549512            |
| 4            | H      | -0.1572595            | 0.085961423          | -0.03564904  | -0.24322092          |
| 5            | H      | -0.2072029            | 0.1856796            | -0.010761648 | -0.39288251          |
| 6            | H      | -0.062116996          | 0.084485809          | 0.011184406  | -0.14660281          |
| 7            | H      | -0.073407645          | 0.065225658          | -0.004090993 | -0.1386333           |

The most electrophilic site is Carbon (index 3) with an f+ value of 0.64232102.
The most nucleophilic site is Oxygen (index 0) with an f- value of 0.39388616.

The total f+ and f- values were conserved (sum(f+) = 1.0000, sum(f-) = 1.0000).
